steps.t: Faeron is waiting for you at the Agarnaith Ranger camp. You should talk to Faeron.
Faeron and Rhadrog are somewhere inside Seregost. You should find the Rangers.
Faeron is outside the Court of Seregost, in Agarnaith. You should talk to Faeron.
Faeron can be found at the Agarnaith Ranger camp. You should talk to Faeron.
